tasks.label: � Build: Frontend
tasks.detail: Runs TypeScript compiler and Vite build. Use this to check for type errors.

tasks.label: �🚀 Start: Dev Environment (Golden Path)
tasks.detail: Opens new terminals for Backend & Frontend, then launches Edge. The most stable way to start.

tasks.label: 🚀 Launch: Phase 1 (Demo)
tasks.detail: Demo Mode: Starts Vite + Edge with CDP (Playwright MCP ready)

tasks.label: 🧹 Clean: Environment
tasks.detail: Kills Node/Python/Edge and clears caches. Run this before starting fresh.

tasks.label: 🚀 Launch: Phase 3 (Cloud)
tasks.detail: Production Mode: Frontend points to Cloud Run backend

tasks.label: Start: Backend
tasks.detail: FastAPI backend with SKIP_AUTH_FOR_TESTING=true (defaults to enterprise@test.com)

tasks.label: Start: Frontend
tasks.detail: Vite dev server on localhost:5173

tasks.label: 🧹 Clean: Kill All
tasks.command: Get-Process -Name 'node','python' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Write-Host '✅ Killed node and python processes'
tasks.detail: Kills all node and python processes

tasks.label: 🧹 Clean: Vite Cache
tasks.command: Push-Location '${workspaceFolder}/frontend'; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force node_modules/.vite -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host '✅ Cleared Vite cache'; Pop-Location
tasks.detail: Clears node_modules/.vite for fresh rebuild

tasks.label: 🔄 Reset: Demo Data
tasks.detail: Clears localStorage, triggers fresh demo data load

tasks.label: Debug: Launch Edge CDP
tasks.detail: Launches Edge with --remote-debugging-port=9222 for MCP Playwright

tasks.label: 🔍 Observe: Inject Watcher
tasks.detail: Injects observer for [CLICK], [NAV], [STATE], [ERROR] console events

tasks.label: 🔍 Observe: Poll State
tasks.detail: Quick snapshot of URL, Zustand store, localStorage

tasks.label: 🎥 Record: UX (CDP 9222)
tasks.detail: Option B: long-running UX recorder. Writes JSONL + summary to frontend/test-results/mcp/

tasks.label: 🚀 Phase 1 (Demo) + 🎥 UX Recorder
tasks.detail: Golden path: start Phase 1 demo (5174 + Edge CDP 9222) then start the UX recorder

tasks.label: 🧪 Test: Quick (UOM Rules)
tasks.command: Push-Location '${workspaceFolder}/frontend'; npx playwright test uom- --project=msedge --reporter=line --timeout=15000; Pop-Location
tasks.detail: Runs UOM rule tests: Terminal, Context Menu, Breadcrumb

tasks.label: 🧪 Test: Phase 1 (UX)
tasks.detail: All Playwright tests in Demo Mode

tasks.label: 📡 Sync: Full Pipeline
tasks.command: Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:8000/openapi.json' -OutFile '${workspaceFolder}/backend/openapi-schema.json'; Copy-Item '${workspaceFolder}/backend/openapi-schema.json' -Destination '${workspaceFolder}/frontend/openapi-spec.json' -Force; Push-Location '${workspaceFolder}/frontend'; npm run types:generate; Pop-Location; Write-Host '✅ OpenAPI exported and frontend types regenerated'
tasks.detail: Backend → OpenAPI → Frontend types

tasks.label: Backend: Health Check
tasks.detail: Checks backend /health endpoint

tasks.label: 🔥 Logfire: Query Errors
tasks.detail: Recent errors from Logfire (last hour)

tasks.label: 🔥 Logfire: Query Warnings
tasks.detail: Recent warnings from Logfire (last 2 hours)

tasks.label: ☁️ GCP: Query Cloud Run Errors
tasks.detail: Recent errors from Cloud Run

tasks.label: ☁️ GCP: Tail Cloud Run Logs
tasks.command: gcloud run services logs tail my-tiny-data-collider --project=mailmind-ai-djbuw --region=europe-west4
tasks.detail: Live streaming logs from Cloud Run (Ctrl+C to stop)

tasks.label: 🔧 Auth: Inject Token (CDP)
tasks.detail: Injects auth token into running Edge (port 9222)
